# Global Coding Rule (Applies to ALL languages)

For any code blocks or lines that might be obscure or non-obvious:

Add generous inline documentation. Write in a user-friendly, explanatory style—like you’re teaching someone who has never seen this code. Don’t just state what the code obviously does like "setting a variable it's value", explain why it’s written that way and what pitfalls it avoids with user friendly language/words.


This rule applies to ALL programming languages in this repository.
